report.summary: Cycle-close Mar 29 v2: 410 uncommitted files (+12 from prior run), 145 TS errors (stable), deploy stale 4+ days — 77 new published slugs and 12 learn pages in working tree awaiting commit+push

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 602 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+1 from last run), 1,231 page.tsx files on disk (+1)
105 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx (wallets/*, investing/best/*, taxes/*, some learn/* and blog/*) — unchanged
145 TypeScript errors (stable): 94 in lido-v3-stvaults-guide, 40 in structured-data.examples.ts, 11 across learn pages — all JSX in non-imported files, non-blocking
77 new slugs added to published-pages.ts in working tree (batches 12-21 on Mar 25, plus Mar 27 batches 1-6) — none deployed yet
12 uncommitted learn pages + 5 OG SVGs + component updates (NotificationCenter, WhaleAlertFeed) in working tree
No regressions detected in codebase. Network egress blocked — unable to verify live HTTP 200 status

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present on disk: fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, prices, defi-yields
7 supporting routes also present: cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, standup-email, subscribe
No changes to API route files since Mar 15 — data layer fully stable
All routes implement triple-layer caching: in-memory + CDN s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate
CoinGecko free tier still in use (no API key detected). Rate limiting risk at scale unchanged
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live API response health or cache TTL behavior

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD at commit 21aaf5b (Mar 25 batch deploy) — now 4+ days stale, no new commits since
410 uncommitted files (+12 from last cycle's 398), 31 files changed with 988 insertions / 595 deletions
CRITICAL: Deploy blocker persists. 77 new published slugs + 12 learn pages + 5 OG images + component fixes all blocked from production
TypeScript compilation: 145 non-blocking errors (JSX syntax in example/guide files). Production build would succeed
Unable to verify live Vercel deployment status due to network egress restrictions

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Quiet Sunday. No new commits. Working tree grew by +12 files (learn pages, OG images, component updates)
PUBLISH_QUEUE: No queue file found — all promotable items appear to have been merged into published-pages.ts directly

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) P0 — 410 uncommitted files need git commit + push to deploy. (2) P1 — 105 published slugs missing page.tsx. (3) P2 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. (4) P3 — Health endpoint uses mock checks
DELTA FROM LAST CYCLE: +12 uncommitted files (398→410), 0 new commits, +1 page.tsx on disk, +1 published slug in working tree, TS errors stable at 145
NEEDS JEFE: Git commit + push remains the single highest-leverage action. 4+ days of accumulated work blocked from production and Google indexing
